nodes.name: New Lead Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives new lead data from forms, landing pages, or other sources. Test with sample payload.

nodes.name: Score Lead (Groq LLM)
nodes.notes: Uses Groq's free LLM to score the lead. Set up httpHeaderAuth credential with: Name: Authorization, Value: Bearer YOUR_GROQ_API_KEY

nodes.name: Parse Score
nodes.notes: Parses LLM response and combines with lead data. Falls back gracefully if JSON parsing fails.

nodes.name: Is Qualified?
nodes.notes: Routes lead based on qualification score. Score >= 7 or qualified: true goes to qualified branch.

nodes.name: Generate Qualified Response
nodes.notes: Generates personalized response for qualified leads with CTA to book a call.

nodes.name: Generate Polite Decline
nodes.notes: Generates polite decline for unqualified leads.

nodes.name: Parse Qualified Email
nodes.notes: Extracts generated email from LLM response for qualified leads.

nodes.name: Parse Decline Email
nodes.notes: Extracts generated email from LLM response for declined leads.

nodes.name: Merge Branches
nodes.notes: Merges qualified and declined branches back together for unified logging.

nodes.name: Log to Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Logs all leads to Google Sheets for tracking and reporting. Create sheet with columns: Timestamp, Name, Email, Company, Message, Score, Qualified, Reasoning, Response Type, Email Sent

nodes.name: Send Email via Gmail
nodes.notes: Sends the AI-generated email response to the lead.

nodes.name: Is Hot Lead?
nodes.notes: Checks if lead score is 8 or higher to trigger Slack alert for immediate follow-up.

nodes.name: Slack Hot Lead Alert
nodes.notes: Sends formatted Slack alert for hot leads (score 8+). Replace YOUR_SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL with your Slack incoming webhook URL.

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes: Returns confirmation to the source that submitted the lead.
